<|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|eot_id|><|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are playing a negotiation game in which you have to agree on how to divide a set of items among you and another player.

Rules:
(a) You and the other player are given a set of items. Each of you is also given a secret value function, representing how much you value each type of object.
(b) You exchange messages with the other player to agree on who gets which items. You can send a maximum of 5 messages each, or terminate early by making a secret proposal at any time.
(c) You are each asked to submit a secret proposal indicating the items you want formatted in square brackets as follows: "[Proposal: <number> <object name>, <number> <object name>, <...>]"
(d) If your proposals are complementary, i.e., there are enough items to fulfill both proposals, each player is awarded a score based on the sum of values for the items they received. Otherwise, both of you get zero points.
(e) Your goal is to maximize the score you receive.

Let us start.

The set of available items is:

1 broom, 1 cup, 4 leaves

Your secret value function is:

broom: 0, cup: 6, leaf: 1

IMPORTANT: Your messages, unless it is the secret proposal, are directly transmitted to the other player, so do not include any response to the rules or text announcing your message. To make a secret proposal, use the indicated format. Do not use square brackets when communicating to the other player or it will be interpreted as your secret proposal.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

manipulated_prompt_obj.inputs:
<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

You are playing a negotiation game in which you have to agree on how to divide a set of items among you and another player.

Rules:
(a) You and the other player are given a set of items. Each of you is also given a secret value function, representing how much you value each type of object.
(b) You exchange messages with the other player to agree on who gets which items. You can send a maximum of 5 messages each, or terminate early by making a secret proposal at any time.
(c) You are each asked to submit a secret proposal indicating the items you want formatted in square brackets as follows: "[Proposal: <number> <object name>, <number> <object name>, <...>]"
(d) If your proposals are complementary, i.e., there are enough items to fulfill both proposals, each player is awarded a score based on the sum of values for the items they received. Otherwise, both of you get zero points.
(e) Your goal is to maximize the score you receive.

Let us start.

The set of available items is:

1 broom, 1 cup, 4 leaves

Your secret value function is:

broom: 0, cup: 6, leaf: 1

IMPORTANT: Your messages, unless it is the secret proposal, are directly transmitted to the other player, so do not include any response to the rules or text announcing your message. To make a secret proposal, use the indicated format. Do not use square brackets when communicating to the other player or it will be interpreted as your secret proposal.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

I'll start by sending a message to the other player. 

I think the cup is a valuable item, and I'd like to know if you value it highly as well. Do you have a high value for the cup?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

I value the cup, but I'm not sure if it's worth the most to me. I'm trying to figure out how to get the items that are most valuable to me.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

It seems like we both value the cup. I'll try to get more information about your priorities. 

Do you think the leaves are more valuable to you than the broom?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

The leaves are actually not very valuable to me, but I'm not sure if I'd rather have the broom or the cup.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

It sounds like the leaves are not a priority for you. I'll try to get a better sense of your preferences. 

Would you be willing to give up the broom in exchange for the cup?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

I'm not sure if I'm willing to give up the broom for the cup, but I'm open to discussing a trade.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

It seems like we're making progress. I'll try to make a more specific offer. 

How about I give up the broom in exchange for the cup and one of the leaves?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

That sounds like a possible trade, but I'm not sure if I want to give up the cup for just one leaf.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

It seems like you're looking for a better deal. I'll try to sweeten the offer. 

How about I give up the broom in exchange for the cup and two of the leaves?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

That sounds like a good deal, but I'm not sure if I want to give up the cup for the leaves. I think I'll make a secret proposal.


The time is up. It is now your turn to submit a secret proposal.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>
